title: Percy Nyx Prince Of Dreams
description: Enter a surreal world of dreams, where glittering drag prince Percy Nyx guides us through the subconscious of Alex, a dreamer caught between childhood stories and adult truths. Blending twisted fairy tales,poetic storytelling, live vocals and drag finery, this genre-bending theatrical cabaret explores identity, gender, and trauma with moving moments of laughter and reflection. Percy Nyx: Prince of Dreams dives headfirst into the magic and meaning of what lies beneath sleep. From Lex Pickett—multi-award-winning performer comes a dazzling journey through dreams, memory, and self-discovery. So sit back, relax, and dream a while with me... (Outstanding Theatre Fringe Award 2025), SohoPlayhouse NY Encore Series finalist, and founding member of multi-award winning cabaret collective ClapBackClub
